data.body: WS1 (neat-spa-ulcer) LANDED locally: commit 4f20635dd. Added committed_work_relies_on_unbacked_claim + respects_artifact_altitude to GRADED_BINARY (na-default, data-driven), evidence_entails_finding 'already states' gloss in both verifier prompts, ADR 0032, kernel+eval tests. Plan-review PASS (6 advisory, triaged). Completion-verifier FAILED first (AC named test_plan_review_evals.py but I'd placed the test in test_review_kernel_rules.py) -> added the AC-named test_verifier_new_subanswers to test_plan_review_evals.py, amended, re-closed -> PASS. Closed w/ both attestations. Unblocked WS2.
